events.title: Buzzin Pattaya Ban Chang Trip
events.description: Have you been to Banchang before? If you haven't come and join us as we head out of the city to a fun packed area that is always a great afternoon/evening. This area has a strip of bars with very welcoming girls. It's only a short 40 minute minibus ride away. Once we get there we visit around 10+ bars unless of course you have a reason to stay in the bar you are in. If you have never been you should make is a "to-do" event as you won't regret it. Air-conditioned minibus picks us up from Buzzin lounge at 2pm and returns at 8:30pm. Tickets cost 400B to cover the cost of the transport. LIMITED to 10 TICKETS ONLY, to get your ticket come to the Buzzin Lounge before Wednesday. Map Location: https://maps.app.goo.gl/i2hyBqreGYbVX6Mw8
